title: UnSpam (unspam.email)
html: Stub. Email deliverability tester — sends a check email and grades SPF, DKIM, DMARC, list-unsubscribe headers, HTML/text ratio, spammy phrases, blacklists. Yahir ran a domain through it Sep 24, 2025, scored 66/100. First mentioned in 2025 09 24 unspam deliverability test.
